17.reason: [Incorrect comparison function: should return 0 for equality and handle all three cases properly for qsort]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect comparison function: should return 0 for equality and handle all three cases properly for qsort]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The comparison function for qsort must return 0 when elements are equal. This implementation never returns 0, leading to undefined behavior, but more critically, the non-ASCII quotes above cause a compilation error before this point is even reached.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [The comparison function for qsort must return 0 when elements are equal; this implementation never returns 0, leading to undefined behavior during sorting]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [The comparison function for qsort must return 0 when elements are equal. This implementation never returns 0, leading to undefined behavior, but more critically, the non-ASCII quotes above cause a compilation error before this point is even reached.]
